{% extends "base.html" %} {% block content %}

{{ tr.profile_page_title }}

{% if db_user.avatar_filename %} {% else %}
{{ db_user.email[0]|upper }}
{% endif %}

{{ db_user.username or db_user.email }}

{{ db_user.email }}

{{ db_user.bio or tr.profile_description_missing }}

{{ tr.profile_personal_info }}

{{ tr.profile_password_change }}

{{ tr.profile_danger_zone }}

{{ tr.profile_delete_warning }}

{{ tr.my_reviews }}

{% if videos %}
{% for video in videos %}
{% if video.media_type == 'video' %} {% else %} {% endif %}
{% if video.status == 'pending_review' %} {{ tr.admin_pending }} {% elif video.status == 'rejected' %} {{ tr.admin_rejected }} {% elif video.status == 'published' %} {{ tr.admin_published }} {% endif %}

{{ video.title }}

{{ tr.edit }}
{% endfor %}
{% else %}

{{ tr.no_reviews_yet }}

{% endif %}
{% endblock %}
